title: Technical Manager (Strategic Sourcing and Supply)
summary: WHO/Unitaid is recruiting a Technical Manager for strategic sourcing and supply in Geneva. The role supports access to health products for HIV, tuberculosis, malaria, women's health, and children's health.
description: The Technical Manager will contribute to strategic sourcing and supply work under Unitaid, a partnership hosted by WHO that accelerates introduction and adoption of key health products.

title: Internship - Country Strategy and Support
summary: WHO is recruiting an intern for Country Strategy and Support in Geneva. The internship supports work to strengthen WHO country-level strategy and engagement.
description: The intern will support WHO's Office of Country Strategy and Support, which works on strengthening WHO's work at country level through participatory, multi-sectoral and multi-stakeholder approaches.

title: Special Services Agreement - Health Systems Officer
summary: WHO Uzbekistan is recruiting a Health Systems Officer under a Special Services Agreement for 12 months.
description: The assignment supports WHO's work with national authorities in Uzbekistan to strengthen health systems and advance health-related sustainable development priorities.

title: National Consultant - Data Specialist, Philippines
summary: WHO Philippines is recruiting a National Consultant - Data Specialist to support M&E, data management, data products, and analytical workstreams.
description: The consultancy supports routine monitoring, evidence-based decision-making, health outcome tracking, and alignment with Universal Health Care priorities in the Philippines.

title: Consultancy to support nutrition databases and analysis
summary: UNICEF is recruiting a consultant to support nutrition databases and analysis for school-age children and adolescent nutrition indicators.
description: The consultant will support data collation, quality assurance and analysis for global nutrition databases, including household survey data and database management.

title: Consultant - Microsoft Power Platform Development, Enhancement, AI Integration, Analytics and Support
summary: UNICEF Mozambique is recruiting an international consultant for Microsoft Power Platform development, enhancement, AI integration, analytics, and support.
description: The assignment covers assessment, solution review, enhancement, integration, maintenance, technical support, Power BI analytics, data standardization, AI enablement, and documentation.

title: National AIC and CFS Consultant for Huila and Cunene
summary: UNICEF Angola is recruiting a national consultant to support AIC, CFS and Libraries without Walls implementation in Huila and Cunene.
description: The consultant will support implementation coordination, monitoring, data management, and documentation of education results and lessons learned.

title: Internship: Research Intern, Digital Impact Division - Digital Inclusion
summary: UNICEF is recruiting a Research Intern for the Digital Impact Division's Digital Inclusion section in Geneva.
description: The intern will support research and geospatial analysis of schools, health centers and other infrastructure, with attention to climate emergencies and digital connectivity for the Global South.

title: Child Protection Case Management and Information Management Consultant
summary: UNICEF is recruiting a consultant for child protection case management and information management support across Latin America and the Caribbean.
description: The consultant will support Primero/CPIMS+ scale-up, technical assistance, partner implementation support, and information management for child protection case management.

title: Program Finance Contractor (Part-Time, Remote - African Continent or Global)
location: Remote - African continent or global, priority Kenya/Africa
summary: charity: water is recruiting a part-time Program Finance Contractor to support grants audit, compliance, and misconduct support.
description: The contractor will support partner finance, compliance, audit, risk management, documentation, and cross-cultural collaboration with partners in Africa and Asia.

title: Development Manager
location: Eastern Time Zone Remote / Kampala / Kigali / Lilongwe / Lusaka / New York
summary: Global Health Corps is recruiting a Development Manager for remote or multi-location work across Eastern Time, East/Southern Africa, and New York.
description: The role supports Global Health Corps' work investing in public and global health leadership through accelerators, alumni programming, fundraising and development work.

title: Bioinformatician / Computational Scientist - NGS and AI Driven Antibody Discovery
summary: VIB is recruiting a Bioinformatician / Computational Scientist for NGS and AI-driven antibody discovery.
description: This opportunity was identified from VIB's official jobs page and is linked directly to the institution's job listing.

title: Post-doctoral Research Scientist - Stem Cell Biology to Model Sporadic Alzheimer's Disease
summary: VIB is recruiting a Post-doctoral Research Scientist in stem cell biology to model sporadic Alzheimer's disease.
description: This opportunity was identified from VIB's official jobs page and is linked directly to the institution's job listing.
